title: Point of Interest (POI) Admin Management UI

tasks.title: Create POI feature config (points-of-interest.config.ts)
tasks.description: Create apps/admin/src/features/points-of-interest/config/points-of-interest.config.ts with apiEndpoint '/api/v1/admin/points-of-interest', basePath '/content/points-of-interest', entity metadata and permission keys (POINT_OF_INTEREST_VIEW/CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), mirroring attractions.config.ts. Tests: unit assert config exports the expected apiEndpoint/basePath/permission shape.

tasks.title: Create POI DataTable columns (points-of-interest.columns.ts)
tasks.description: Create config/points-of-interest.columns.ts per spec §6.7: name (ENTITY widget via resolveI18nText(nameI18n) linking to $id), slug, type, hasOwnPage BOOLEAN, isFeatured, displayWeight WeightBarCell, lifecycleState InlineStateSelectCell gated by POINT_OF_INTEREST_LIFECYCLE_CHANGE, createdAt TIME_AGO, actions gated by POINT_OF_INTEREST_DELETE/_UPDATE. NO destinationCount column (OQ-3). Tests: unit assert column ids/order and the nameI18n resolver never yields raw object/slug-silent-fallback (AC-1).

tasks.title: Basic Info consolidated section (basic-info.consolidated.ts)
tasks.description: Create config/sections/basic-info.consolidated.ts per spec §6.3: slug TEXT (regex ^[a-z0-9]+(?:[-_][a-z0-9]+)*$), nameI18n I18N_TEXT (required, maxLength), descriptionI18n I18N_TEXTAREA (optional), type SELECT from PointOfInterestTypeEnum (label notes legacy/transitional NG-5), icon TEXT. Permission-gated per field like attractions. Tests: unit assert field ids/types/required flags.

tasks.title: Location consolidated section (location.consolidated.ts)
tasks.description: Create config/sections/location.consolidated.ts per spec §6.3: address TEXT (optional), keywords TEXTAREA ('one per line' convention §6.5), coordinates COORDINATES reusing CoordinatesField unmodified with typeConfig.addressFields.street wired to address for forward geocoding. Tests: unit assert field ids/types and that coordinates maps lat/long.

tasks.title: Curation consolidated section (curation.consolidated.ts)
tasks.description: Create config/sections/curation.consolidated.ts: verified SWITCH, verifiedAt (read-only/date), source TEXT, notes TEXTAREA, permission-gated per field. Tests: unit assert field ids/types.

tasks.title: States & Moderation consolidated section (states-moderation.consolidated.ts)
tasks.description: Create config/sections/states-moderation.consolidated.ts mirroring attractions' createStatesModerationConsolidatedSection: lifecycleState, isFeatured, isBuiltin, hasOwnPage SWITCH, displayWeight NUMBER, permission-gated. Tests: unit assert field ids/types.

tasks.title: Compose consolidated config + section/config barrels
tasks.description: Create config/poi-consolidated.config.ts composing the 4 sections (basic-info, location, curation, states-moderation) like attraction-consolidated.config.ts, plus config/sections/index.ts and config/index.ts barrels. Tests: unit assert the composed config lists all 4 sections in order.

tasks.title: POI CRUD query hooks (usePointOfInterestQuery.ts)
tasks.description: Create hooks/usePointOfInterestQuery.ts via createEntityHooks mirroring useAttractionQuery.ts, typed against @repo/schemas POI admin types + local aliases (T-010). Tests: unit assert hook wiring (query keys, endpoint).

tasks.title: POI page orchestration hook (usePointOfInterestPage.ts) + barrel
tasks.description: Create hooks/usePointOfInterestPage.ts mirroring useAttractionPage.ts (page-level orchestration, submit-payload builder seam for keywords split/trim/filter §6.5 and lat/long Number() coercion §6.3), plus hooks/index.ts. Tests: unit assert keywords transform (AC-6) and coordinate coercion (AC-7) in the payload builder.

tasks.title: Admin-local POI schema aliases (points-of-interest.schemas.ts)
tasks.description: Create schemas/points-of-interest.schemas.ts with thin local type aliases re-exporting/narrowing @repo/schemas POI admin types for the admin hooks factory, mirroring attractions.schemas.ts. No new validation logic. Tests: typecheck-only (no runtime logic).

tasks.title: PointOfInterestSubTabLayout component
tasks.description: Create components/PointOfInterestSubTabLayout.tsx mirroring DestinationSubTabLayout/AccommodationSubTabLayout (§6.6): breadcrumb (resolveI18nText(poi.nameI18n)) + tab nav Overview/Categories/Destinations/Edit. Per-entity, no generic abstraction. Tests: unit assert tab links render for a given id.

tasks.title: LIST route (index.tsx)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/index.tsx: DataTable via EntityPageBase list mode using the columns (T-002) + config (T-001). Manual/e2e-style verify: renders paginated POIs, name resolves from nameI18n (AC-1).

tasks.title: CREATE route (new.tsx)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/new.tsx: EntityCreateContent with afterCreateRedirectMode 'edit' (§6.2). Basic Info + Location sections only. Applies keywords + coordinate coercion via the page submit builder (T-009). Test: assert post-create route is $id/edit (AC-2).

tasks.title: EDIT route ($id_.edit.tsx)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/$id_.edit.tsx: EntityPageBase edit mode + all 4 consolidated sections (Basic Info incl I18nTextField, Location, Curation, States & Moderation). Manual verify: edit round trip persists via API. (TranslationSection mount added later in T-023.)

tasks.title: VIEW route ($id.tsx, Overview tab)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/$id.tsx: EntityPageBase view mode, Overview tab default, wrapped in PointOfInterestSubTabLayout. Manual verify: view renders resolved fields.

tasks.title: PoiCategorySelectField + category api utils
tasks.description: Create components/entity-form/fields/entity-selects/PoiCategorySelectField.tsx wrapping EntitySelectField (multiple, client search) + loadAllPoiCategories()/loadPoiCategoriesByIds() utils mirroring amenity-api.utils.ts. Chip labels via resolveI18nText. Tests: unit assert loaders map API rows to options.

tasks.title: PoiCategoryManager component
tasks.description: Create components/PoiCategoryManager.tsx (§6.4): chip multi-select over poi_categories + a primary-radio list DERIVED from the current selection (invalid primary structurally impossible, AC-3), 'Save categories' calls PUT /{id}/categories with {categoryIds, primaryCategoryId} (full replace). Toast on failure, no silent revert (§8).

tasks.title: Categories tab route ($id_.categories.tsx)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/$id_.categories.tsx rendering PoiCategoryManager inside PointOfInterestSubTabLayout, fetching current categories via GET /{id}/categories.

tasks.title: PoiCategoryManager component tests
tasks.description: Component tests for PoiCategoryManager (AC-3, AC-10): happy-path render, primary-must-be-selected constraint, and one failure-path (network error) verifying toast + no silent revert.

tasks.title: PoiDestinationRelationManager component
tasks.description: Create components/PoiDestinationRelationManager.tsx (§6.6, FaqManager per-row-persist precedent): list current relations (GET /{id}/destinations), each row = linked destination name + PRIMARY/NEARBY badge + inline relation <select> (PATCH, optimistic + rollback on error) + remove (DELETE, confirm dialog). 'Add destination' row = DestinationSelectField combobox + relation radio + Add (POST). No bulk save.

tasks.title: Destinations tab route ($id_.destinations.tsx)
tasks.description: Create routes/_authed/content/points-of-interest/$id_.destinations.tsx rendering PoiDestinationRelationManager inside PointOfInterestSubTabLayout.

tasks.title: PoiDestinationRelationManager component tests
tasks.description: Component tests for PoiDestinationRelationManager (AC-4, AC-5, AC-10): happy-path render, relation change persists + rollback on failed PATCH, remove shows confirmation before DELETE, one network-error failure path.

tasks.title: AI-translate wiring (TranslationSection widen + edit mount)
tasks.description: §6.8/G-7: widen TranslationSection.tsx entityType union to include 'pointOfInterest' and add pointOfInterest: ['name','description'] to TRANSLATABLE_FIELDS; mount <TranslationSection entityType="pointOfInterest" entityId={id} entity={poi} /> on $id_.edit.tsx. HOS-143 G-6 backend already shipped (verified), so no feature gate needed. Verify: AC-8 translate round trip.

tasks.title: Navigation registration (sidebar + create-action)
tasks.description: §6.9/G-8: add sidebar link in sidebars.ts (route /content/points-of-interest, permissions ['POINT_OF_INTEREST_VIEW']) mirroring atracciones, and newPointOfInterest entry in create-actions.ts (route /content/points-of-interest/new, permissions ['POINT_OF_INTEREST_CREATE']). Verify AC-9 permission gating.

tasks.title: Docs: POI relation-manager pattern in admin CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: §6 Phase 6: update apps/admin/CLAUDE.md (FAQ Management-adjacent section or a new one) documenting the POI relation-manager + category-manager tab pattern for future entities.

tasks.title: Quality gate + manual verification checklist
tasks.description: Phase 7: pnpm --filter admin typecheck/lint/test all green (AC-10) — DONE. Aggregated gate ALL GREEN (3 typechecks + biome 36 files + 236 scoped tests + i18n parity). Judgment-day review in progress. REMAINING: manual verification (create/edit a POI with multilang + categories + coords-on-map via wt:up, confirm persistence via GET /api/v1/admin/points-of-interest/{id}, AC-7).

summary.note: All 7 phases implemented + 3 HOS-143 gap fixes (catalog list endpoint, adminList/adminSearchSchema 500, GET /{id}/categories isPrimary). Aggregated quality gate ALL GREEN. T-026 remainder = manual end-to-end verification via wt:up.
